data.summary_suggestion: Submit episode for AI content repurposing
data.description_suggestion: Submits a podcast episode for AI-powered processing and content generation. The operation accepts episode audio or metadata and initiates transcription, summarization, and social media content generation. Returns an EpisodeResponse object containing the processing job ID and status. Processing is asynchronous - the episode will be queued for analysis and results will be available once processing completes.
